'''sagoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oscillopathy|oscillopathy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-g-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oscillopathy|oscillopathy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sagoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sægeseth|sægeseth]] || [[word:sægesej|sægesej]] || [[word:sægesesh|sægesesh]] || [[word:sægese|sægese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sagogosoth|sagogosoth]] || [[word:sagogosoj|sagogosoj]] || [[word:sagogososh|sagogososh]] || [[word:sagogoso|sagogoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sagosoth|sagosoth]] || [[word:sagosoj|sagosoj]] || [[word:sagososh|sagososh]] || [[word:sagoso|sagoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sagofsoth|sagofsoth]] || [[word:sagofsoj|sagofsoj]] || [[word:sagofsosh|sagofsosh]] || [[word:sagofsof|sagofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sagosotho|sagosotho]] || [[word:sagosojo|sagosojo]] || [[word:sagososho|sagososho]] || [[word:sagosoko|sagosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sagosoth|sagosoth]] || [[word:sagosoj|sagosoj]] || [[word:sagososh|sagososh]] || [[word:sagoso|sagoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sagosothol|sagosothol]] || [[word:sagosojol|sagosojol]] || [[word:sagososhol|sagososhol]] || [[word:sagosokol|sagosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sagosothotho|sagosothotho]] || [[word:sagosojojo|sagosojojo]] || [[word:sagososhosho|sagososhosho]] || [[word:sagosoko|sagosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sagosothon|sagosothon]] || [[word:sagosojon|sagosojon]] || [[word:sagososhon|sagososhon]] || [[word:sagosokon|sagosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sagosothoro|sagosothoro]] || [[word:sagosojoro|sagosojoro]] || [[word:sagososhoro|sagososhoro]] || [[word:sagosokoro|sagosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
